title: Texas Instruments 2Q results ‘status quo' as automotive demand remains strong: analysts
text: Texas Instruments Inc (NYSE:TXN)'s (TI) second-quarter 2023 financial results were “status quo,” with the global semiconductor company seeing weakness across all end-markets with the exception of its Automotive segment where demand remains strong, according to Baird Equity Research analysts.   In an update to clients, they also noted the company's 3Q guidance reflects a sequential decline in gross margin, attributable primarily to capacity increases (depreciation and costs related to added capacity) according to management.
